title: Productivity Assistant
description: Supporting executives and teams with productivity management, scheduling, and administrative coordination.
achievements: Manage executive calendars, scheduling, and meeting coordination
Handle email management and prioritize communications efficiently
Support workflow optimization and task tracking for team productivity
Coordinate logistics and administrative tasks across departments

title: Customer Service Representative
description: Managing inbound and outbound customer communications, resolving inquiries, and maintaining high customer satisfaction ratings.
achievements: Manage inbound and outbound customer communications via phone and email with timely, accurate support
Resolve inquiries related to billing, account management, product features, and technical issues
Utilize CRM software to log interactions, track customer cases, and update profiles with precision
Assist customers with troubleshooting common technical problems and guiding them through solutions
Handle multiple customer requests simultaneously in a fast-paced environment
Achieved recognition for consistently maintaining high customer satisfaction ratings

title: Assistant Accountant Intern
description: Supported daily financial operations including tax filing, loan documentation, and financial record maintenance.
achievements: Supported daily financial operations including tax filing and compliance with tax regulations
Processed and verified loan documentation for accuracy and completeness
Responded to member inquiries on loan options, repayment plans, and financial policies
Assisted with account reconciliations, financial record maintenance, and report preparation
Utilized Microsoft Excel for data entry, financial analysis, and report generation
Created documents and presentations in Microsoft Word and PowerPoint for administrative support

title: B.Sc. Mathematics & Computer Science
description: Comprehensive degree combining mathematical foundations with computer science principles.
achievements: Strong foundation in algorithms and data structures
Applied mathematics to problem-solving
Developed programming skills across multiple languages

title: AI Career Essentials Certification
description: Certified in AI Career Essentials, gaining foundational knowledge in artificial intelligence applications.
achievements: Completed AI fundamentals curriculum
Understanding of AI tools for business operations
Applied AI concepts to enhance productivity and workflow
